title: SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: WEST AREA OFFICE SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services to older adults, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers. Services include Medicaid case management, SNAP/food stamps administration, and transportation. 209 SW 4th Avenue 1st floor Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, veterans, and caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-5460 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 988-5460 Main phone (503) 988-2518 Intake (503) 988-3560 FAX (503) 988-6983 TTY/TTD Main phone (503) 988-5460 Intake (503) 988-2518 FAX (503) 988-3560 TTY/TTD (503) 988-6983 Adult Protective Services (503) 988-4450 Reporting Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None for most programs DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County west of the Willamette River (parts of zip codes 97219, 97229, and 97231 and all of zip codes 97201, 97204, 97205, 97208, 97209, 97210, 97221, and 97239) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Downtown Portland on SW Oak Street between 4th and 5th Avenues. Near "big pink" bank tower. On TriMet Transit Mall. Served by several bus lines and MAX Yellow and Green Lines: .5 block for southbound trains/buses, 1.5 blocks for northbound trains/buses. Door opener buttons at Oak Street entrance to building, to office, and to restrooms. Assistive listening device available for in-office visits. Services: Case/Care Management * Medicaid Recipients Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Food Stamps/SNAP * Veterans Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Medicaid * Veterans Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEST AREA OFFICE
